name: Five-Spice Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. In a small bowl, combine sugar, five-spice powder, and red pepper flakes. Coat the beef cubes with the spice mixture.
3. Heat sesame oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
4. Add the coated beef to the skillet and brown for 1-2 minutes.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients (cooked rice, peanuts, soy sauce) and mix well.
6. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until everything is thoroughly heated through.
Microwave Oven Instructions:
1. In a microwave-safe dish, combine oil and garlic. Cook on HIGH for 30 seconds.
2. Add beef and cook for 1-2 minutes or until the meat loses most of its pink color.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (cooked rice, peanuts, soy sauce) and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until thoroughly heated through.
